Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kevin Mahoney, esq. (562-590-5550) for Plaintiff via Courtcall.
Philip Smith, esq. (415-490-9027) of Fisher Philips for Defendant.

The Court called the matter, provided its tentative ruling in hard copy to Mr. Philips and via email to Mr. Mahoney, then passed the matter for counsel to review the tentative ruling.
Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs SUNRUN INC., and SUNRUN INSTALLATION SERVICES INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of Arbitration is under submission.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***Order is signed after hearing***
